verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was in the Garden of Eden There on a hill; I was with Moses, and the children of Israel When they crossed the great Red Sea I was with King David, When he shouted on the streets But the greatest place I've been, Was that day on Calvary

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: That day on Calvary, I was in Calvary Every name in the Lamb's Book of Life Was then right there, O I was in His mind The day when He died, And He paid the price for me That day on Calvary

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was in my way with pilgrim When they sailed across the sea I was in Philadelphia, When they proclaimed the liberty I was with Abraham Lincoln, When he set the slave's free But still the greatest place I've been Was that day on Calvary
